name: Aisha Rahman
bio: Met in first year of university. We used to pull all-nighters before every exam. She's now doing her Masters in London.

name: Rafiul Hasan
bio: Grew up on the same street. We've been friends since we were 7. Still meets up for tea every few weeks.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: My senior at the office who taught me everything about the job in my first month. Super supportive and always available for advice.

name: Tanvir Ahmed
bio: We backpacked through Cox's Bazar and Sylhet together. Planning our next trip to Nepal. Terrible at replying but always shows up.

name: Meherun Nesa
bio: We started going to the gym together last year and became inseparable. She keeps me accountable and always brings homemade snacks.

name: Sabbir Hossain
bio: We joined the company the same week and bonded over lunch breaks. Great at cracking jokes during the most stressful sprints.

name: Lamia Sultana
bio: Best friends from school since class 6. Life got busy after HSC but we never lost touch completely. Deserves more of my time.

name: Imran Chowdhury
bio: Met in a Discord server during COVID and we've been gaming together ever since. We finally met in person last Eid.
